我们的服务

从打包到落地，一站式精致搬家

详情家庭搬家 Home Removals

专业搬运团队与卡车，最贴心华人客服。客户确认后绝不临时加价；每一次落地轻放、打包整理，都是经验累积的专业与细心。Professional crews and trucks with caring bilingual support. Prices agreed upfront — never surprise fees. Every careful lift and wrap reflects years of experience.

详情全屋定制 Custom Interiors

国内顶级室内设计师操刀，材料由国内进口及澳洲本地制造。橱柜、衣柜、浴室、厨房专属定制，品味满满。欢迎预约展间参观，现场有设计师讲解。Bespoke interiors by top designers, with imported and locally-made materials. Custom kitchens, wardrobes, bathrooms and cabinetry tailored to you — book a showroom visit.
查看完整介绍 / Learn more →

详情傢俱安裝 Furniture Assembly

国内海运家具的落地与安装，是我们的初心与最专业的业务。安装无数、回头客无数；落地后的一切，放心交给我们。Delivery-day placement and assembly of shipped furniture — our founding specialty. Countless installs and loyal clients; leave the after-delivery work to us.
查看完整介绍 / Learn more →

详情餐厅/工厂设备搬迁 Commercial Relocation

生意停摆、租约到期在所难免。我们为许多有理想的老板搬过餐厅与工厂设备——那从不是结束，当你决定重新出发，我们随时在线。Lease ending or a business pause? We've relocated restaurant and factory equipment for many owners. When you're ready to restart, we're on call.

详情货柜装卸 Container Loading

我们有一支专为集装箱装卸打造的工人团队，可配合你的进度与时间。私人或公司货柜装卸，欢迎咨询最合理实惠的报价。A crew built for container work — loading and unloading to your schedule. Private or commercial containers; ask us for a fair, competitive quote.

详情清洁&垃圾处理 Cleaning & Rubbish

以量计价，处理各类大型垃圾，退租后旧家具一并清走，甚至包含清洁复原的定制服务。Priced by volume — bulky rubbish, end-of-lease furniture clear-outs, plus optional deep-clean and restoration.

详情木工&电工 Handyman

除了搬运，我们还有专业木工、电工与 handyman。目标是全方面高效服务每位顾客，为你带来更便利的生活。Beyond moving — in-house carpenters, electricians and handymen. All-round, efficient help to make everyday life easier.

详情仓储寄存&配送 Storage & Delivery

我们拥有自有仓储空间，大型家具或行李需要寄存，可安排配送与保存服务。Our own warehouse space — store large furniture or luggage, with delivery and safekeeping arranged.
